'''Arkonne III''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Arkonne system/Legends|Arkonne system]] inhabited by [[Human/Legends|Humans]] such as business rivals [[Divina Quri Adner]] and [[Phean Tic'Karcta]]. Phean sabotaged Divina's vehicle, killing her. [[Wilek Nereus]], Divina's beau, put an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on Phean, whom he personally killed.

{{Planet-stub}}
